title: HTML Structure & Tags
subtitle: Create Your First Web Page
overview: Students will learn the basic structure of an HTML document and use common tags such as headings and paragraphs to create their first web page named index.html.

images._note: Add screenshots of HTML code, browser output, and student activities.

youtubeVideos.title: HTML for Beginners
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn the basics of HTML and create your first web page.

youtubeVideos.title: HTML Structure Explained
youtubeVideos.desc: Understanding the structure of an HTML document.

youtubeVideos.title: HTML Headings and Paragraphs
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn how to use heading and paragraph tags.

activity.title: Create Your First index.html Page
steps: Create a new file named index.html
Add a title inside the title tag
Open the file in a web browser
Modify the heading and paragraph text

sampleCode.code:
Welcome to HTML

This is my first webpage.

I am learning HTML structure and tags.

quiz.explanation: HTML stands for Hyper Text Markup Language.

quiz.q: Which tag is used as the root element of an HTML document?
quiz.explanation: The <html> tag contains the entire HTML document.

quiz.q: Which section contains information about the webpage?
quiz.explanation: The <head> section contains metadata and title information.

quiz.q: Which tag displays the webpage title in the browser tab?
quiz.explanation: The <title> tag defines the page title.

quiz.q: Which tag is used for the largest heading?
quiz.explanation: The h1 tag creates the largest heading.

quiz.q: How many heading levels are available in HTML?
quiz.explanation: HTML provides headings from h1 to h6.

quiz.q: Which tag is used to create a paragraph?
quiz.explanation: The p tag is used for paragraphs.

quiz.q: Where is the visible webpage content written?
quiz.explanation: The body tag contains all visible content.

quiz.q: What is the recommended name for the homepage file?
quiz.explanation: index.html is commonly used as the default homepage.

quiz.q: What symbol is used to create HTML tags?
quiz.explanation: HTML tags are enclosed within angle brackets.

quiz.q: Which tag marks the end of a paragraph?
What happens if you save a file with a .html extension?
options: It can be opened as a webpage
quiz.explanation: HTML files can be viewed in web browsers.

quiz.q: Which tag contains both head and body sections?
quiz.explanation: The html tag wraps the entire webpage.

options: They tell the browser how to display content
quiz.explanation: HTML tags define the structure and content of a webpage.

quiz.q: What is the main objective of today's session?
options: Create a basic webpage using HTML structure and tags
quiz.explanation: Students learn to create a simple webpage using headings and paragraphs.
